extraction.one_line_summary: COLBRELLI Sonny won from a three-rider sprint after MOSCON Johnny's 45-second solo lead evaporated via puncture then crash with 20km remaining
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu bridged from chase to solo leader MOSCON after the Italian's puncture, timing attack perfectly.
MOSCON Johnny's front group isolation led to mechanical vulnerability; no teammates meant 45-second advantage disappeared instantly after puncture.
Velodrome finale favored inside line positioning: COLBRELLI went center lane while VAN DER POEL forced wide, decisive in three-up sprint.

rider_signals.MOSCON Johnny: positive: held 45-second solo advantage post-breakaway despite puncture, showing breakthrough Monument capability before crash ruined finish
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: negative: crashed early at 100km mark and never featured again, marking continued decline in cobbled Classics strength
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: only experienced rider to match debutants VAN DER POEL/VERMEERSCH in final selection, superior velodrome positioning won Monument debut
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: debutant bridged to race leader then contested final sprint, confirming immediate elite cobbles ability despite Roubaix inexperience
rider_signals.VERMEERSCH Florian: positive: debutant reached podium from early 31-rider breakaway, attacking in velodrome showed aggression despite second place
